title: Salem Records 90.13% Turnout: Highest in Kongu Region
summary: Salem district achieved 90.13% voter participation, the highest in Kongu belt, with Veerapandi and Sankari crossing 90% individually.

title: Counting Centre Bans Mobile Phones Inside Halls on May 4
summary: Strict security protocols implemented for election counting with complete mobile phone ban inside counting halls on May 4.

title: Annamalai Appeals to Christian and Muslim Voters in Salem
summary: Former BJP state chief K. Annamalai appealed to Christian and Muslim communities citing concerns over 275% property tax hike in Salem corporation.

title: DMK Worker Dies on Election Duty; Mother Passes Away Next Day
summary: A DMK party worker collapsed and died while performing election duties. His mother passed away the following day, compounding family tragedy.

title: Woman Arrested for Killing Son and Burying Body in Areca Farm
summary: Police arrested a woman from Vazhapadi Belur for allegedly murdering her son and hiding the body in an areca nut farm.

title: Decomposed Woman's Body Found in Suitcase in Salem District
summary: Police discovered the remains of a woman's body packed in a suitcase within Salem district. Investigation into circumstances ongoing.

title: Two Schoolboys Killed in Truck-Bike Collision Near Anthiyur
summary: Two young students died when a truck collided with their two-wheeler near Anthiyur in a fatal accident on district roads.

title: IMD Issues Heavy Rain Alert for May 1-2
summary: India Meteorological Department warns of intense rainfall expected for May 1-2, bringing relief from extreme heat conditions.

title: Residents Protest 275% Property Tax Hike Without Matching Development
summary: Salem corporation residents allege massive 275% property tax increase without corresponding improvements in civic infrastructure and services.

title: Temperatures Soar Above 100°F Across Salem District
summary: Salem district experiencing extreme heatwave conditions with temperatures consistently exceeding 100°F (37.8°C) daily.
